ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

processing_metadata.document_quality_notes: Both documents are text-based PDFs with high readability. The certificate file (Document A) contains both a certificate (page 1) and the same invoice (pages 2-8). The invoice file (Document B) contains the same invoice (pages 1-7). No OCR issues detected.

document_a.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully readable. Page 1 is the certificate. Pages 2-8 contain an embedded copy of the invoice and general terms.

document_b.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully readable. 7 pages: 6 pages of invoice line items + 1 page of general terms and conditions.

document_pairing.method: Certificate on page 1 of Document A. Invoice from Document B (the separate invoice file). The certificate references order number S7081TR806 and the invoice bears the same order number. The certificate file also contains an embedded copy of the invoice (pages 2-7) but per rule 8.5.0, verification is against the separate invoice file (Document B).
document_pairing.sanity_check_details: Criterion 1: Certificate references order S7081TR806, invoice bears order number S7081TR806 - MATCH. Criterion 2: Consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' identifiable in invoice as 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' at same address Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, Sweden - MATCH. Criterion 3: Consignee 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' identifiable in invoice delivery address - MATCH. All three criteria met.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'S7081TR806' is an order number, not an LC reference.

locations_found: Document B, page 1, footer: 'Berg Propulsion Production AB, Box 1005, 475 22 ÖCKERÖ, SWEDEN' (Mailing address) and 'Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN' (Visiting address)
Document B, pages 2-6, same footer on every page
consignor_search_results.search_notes: Certificate consignor is 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' at Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden. The invoice issuer is 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' at Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN. 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is a layout-abbreviated form of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'.

consignor.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 – Koncernstruktur: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: The certificate consignor is 'Berg Prop Prod. AB'. The invoice issuer (in footer on every page) is 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. The name 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is not found verbatim in the invoice. However, the full name 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' is found. Proceed to sequential checks 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.
Certificate: 'Berg Prop Prod. AB'. Invoice: 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. These differ — 'Prop' vs 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' vs 'Production'. Proceed to 4.1.3.2.

APPLICABLE. 'Prop' is an abbreviation of 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' is an abbreviation of 'Production'. The certificate name 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' appears to be an abbreviated form of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' due to field-length constraints in the certificate. However, this is not strictly a prefix truncation (the name isn't cut off mid-word at the end), but rather abbreviated words within. This is more accurately a commercial abbreviation. Proceed to 4.1.3.3.

APPLICABLE. 'Prop' is a vedertagen (established) abbreviation of 'Propulsion'. 'Prod.' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Production'. The full legal name 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' appears expressly in the invoice footer on every page. No other legal entity with a similar name structure appears in the invoice. The address (Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ) and country (Sweden) match exactly. No information in the invoice contradicts that this is the same legal entity. ALL conditions of 4.1.3.3 are met → MATCH.

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' at Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40 HÖNÖ, Sweden is a commercially abbreviated form of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' at Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN appearing in the invoice. 'Prop' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Production'. The full name appears expressly in the invoice. Address and country match. No contradicting information. MATCH per 4.1.3.3.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN'. Normalization: 'Prop' → abbreviation of 'Propulsion', 'Prod.' → abbreviation of 'Production'. Rule 4.1.3.3 applied. Land: Sweden = SWEDEN after case normalization. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: BERG Propulsion Shanghai, Room1704, Xu Hui Wan Ke Centre, Lee Kun Kee Plaza, No 970, Nanning Road, Shanghai P.R.C 200235, China
consignee.invoice_value: BERG Propulsion Shanghai, Rm. 1704, Xu Hui Wan Ke Center Lee Kun Kee Plaza, No.970, Nanning Road, Shanghai, 200235, PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA

comparison_steps.result: The invoice does not have a standard 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' / 'Buyer' field. The invoice has a 'Delivery address' field showing 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' and a 'Mailing address' field showing 'Sinopec Offshore Oilfield Services Company'. Since no explicit billing/factureringsfält exists, and the delivery address names BERG Propulsion Shanghai which matches the certificate consignee, we apply 4.2.1.1 (alternativ mottagaradress) — the delivery address is used as fallback.
Certificate: 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai'. Invoice delivery address: 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: 'China'. Invoice: 'PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA'. After normalization (China = People's Republic of China) → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Alternativ mottagaradress – No primary billing field found; delivery address used as fallback
Företagsnamn verifierat – 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' found exactly in invoice delivery address
Landkontroll – China = People's Republic of China

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' with country 'China' is found exactly in the invoice delivery address as 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' in 'PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA'. The invoice lacks a standard billing field, so delivery address is used as fallback per 4.2.1.1. Name matches exactly. Country matches after normalization (China = People's Republic of China). MATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai ... China'. Invoice delivery address: 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai ... PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA'. Name: exact match. Country: China = People's Republic of China. Rule 4.2.1.1 fallback applied since no explicit Bill-To field exists. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Order:S7081TR806
SHIP SPARES 1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg
According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25
goods_description.invoice_value: Commercial invoice with Order number S7081TR806, Order date 2025-07-04, containing bearings, seals, o-rings, washers, springs, circlips, shims, service kits and other ship spare parts

comparison_steps.result: No article numbers are specified in the certificate. The certificate uses a generell varubeskrivning 'SHIP SPARES'. Proceed to Prioritet 2/3.

The certificate states 'According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25'. This is an uttrycklig hänvisning to the invoice. The order reference S7081TR806 matches the invoice order number exactly. The date 04/07/25 corresponds to 2025-07-04 (DD/MM/YY format) which matches the invoice order date 2025-07-04. The invoice contains ship spare parts (bearings, seals, o-rings, washers, etc.) which are consistent with 'SHIP SPARES'. The fakturareferens (order number and date) match. MATCH per 4.3.5.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate references order S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25, invoice bears same order number and date

goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses generell varubeskrivning 'SHIP SPARES' with uttrycklig fakturahänvisning 'According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25'. Invoice order number is S7081TR806 and order date is 2025-07-04. Date normalization: 04/07/25 (DD/MM/YY) = 2025-07-04 → exact match. Invoice content (bearings, seals, o-rings, washers, springs, service kits) is consistent with 'SHIP SPARES'. Per 4.3.5 the varubeskrivning is verified via the matching fakturareferens. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25'. Invoice header: 'Order number S7081TR806, Order date 2025-07-04'. Order number matches exactly. Date: 04/07/25 interpreted as DD/MM/YY = 4 July 2025 = 2025-07-04 = invoice date. Invoice contains ship spare parts consistent with 'SHIP SPARES'. Rule 4.3.5 conditions all met. MATCH.

quantity.certificate_value: 1 pcs (box 7); also '1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg' in box 6
quantity.invoice_value: Multiple line items across 6 pages of invoice

comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains '1 pcs'. Box 6 contains '1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg'. Per 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet. Box 7 value: 1 pcs.

The certificate states '1 pcs' in box 7 referring to a shipment/package (described as '1x 80*60*78cm' in box 6). This is a försändelsekvantitet (1 package/shipment). Per 4.4.3.2, this is verified when: (a) the certificate contains a verifiable fakturareferens per 4.3.5 — YES, order S7081TR806 matched; (b) the invoice contains varuspecifikation corresponding to the shipment — YES, the invoice contains the full list of ship spares for order S7081TR806. The försändelsekvantitet '1 pcs' (1 shipment/package) is verified.

The invoice does not contain a total weight field or total quantity that contradicts the certificate. The '194 kg' TW in box 6 is supplementary packaging info, not the box 7 verifieringsgrundande kvantitet. No contradiction found.

rules_applied.description: Försändelsekvantitet – '1 pcs' interpreted as 1 shipment/package, verified via matching fakturareferens
Flera kvantitetsuppgifter – at least one quantity (försändelsekvantitet) verified, no contradictions

quantity.motivation: Certificate box 7 states '1 pcs'. This is a försändelsekvantitet per 4.4.3.2 — the certificate describes one shipment package ('1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg'). The certificate contains a verified fakturareferens (order S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25 matching invoice). The invoice contains varuspecifikation for the referenced order. Per 4.4.3.2 the försändelsekvantitet is verified. No contradicting quantity in the invoice. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Box 7: '1 pcs'. Box 6: '1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg'. The '1 pcs' in box 7 is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet per 4.4.2.1. This represents a försändelsekvantitet (1 package). Per 4.4.3.2: certificate has verified fakturareferens (4.3.5 met), invoice has varuspecifikation for same order. Försändelsekvantitet verified. The TW: 194 kg is in box 6, not box 7, and is supplementary. No total weight in invoice to contradict. MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, People's Republic of China, United Kingdom, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands, Taiwan

comparison_steps.result: The invoice contains per-article 'Country of origin' fields. Origins found: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, People's Republic of China, United Kingdom, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands, Taiwan.
Certificate box 3: 'EU, China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan'. After normalization: EU (European Union), China, Bulgaria, UK (United Kingdom), Taiwan.
Certificate says 'EU'. Invoice contains EU member states: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands. These are all EU-27 members. EU origin is verified.
Certificate says 'China'. Invoice says 'People's Republic of China' (for LR2180 CIRCLIP). China = People's Republic of China after normalization. MATCH.
Certificate says 'Bulgaria'. Invoice says 'Bulgaria' (for TO4460 BLADE SEAL). MATCH.
Certificate says 'UK'. Invoice says 'United Kingdom' (for LX4492 and LX4447). UK = United Kingdom after normalization. MATCH.
Certificate says 'Taiwan'. Invoice says 'Taiwan' (for BP0996, BP0994, BG1510). MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice not listed in certificate
comparison_steps.result: CRITICAL CHECK. Certificate origins: EU, China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan. Invoice non-EU origins: China (listed in cert ✓), UK (listed in cert ✓), Taiwan (listed in cert ✓). Invoice EU-member origins: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands — all EU members, covered by 'EU' in certificate. Bulgaria is also explicitly listed in certificate AND is an EU member. But wait — Bulgaria is BOTH listed explicitly in the certificate AND is an EU member state. This is fine and does not create a conflict.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Verify all invoice origins are covered by certificate
comparison_steps.result: Invoice origins: Germany (EU ✓), Sweden (EU ✓), Bulgaria (explicit in cert ✓ and EU ✓), People's Republic of China (China in cert ✓), United Kingdom (UK in cert ✓), Italy (EU ✓), Denmark (EU ✓), The Netherlands (EU ✓), Taiwan (in cert ✓). ALL invoice origins are covered by the certificate's listed origins (EU + China + Bulgaria + UK + Taiwan).

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check certificate origins are all present in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: EU → invoice has multiple EU member states ✓. China → invoice has People's Republic of China ✓. Bulgaria → invoice has Bulgaria ✓. UK → invoice has United Kingdom ✓. Taiwan → invoice has Taiwan ✓. ALL certificate origins are verifiable in the invoice.

Certificate has multiple origins but does NOT specify origin per article in box 6. However, the certificate contains an uttrycklig hänvisning to the invoice ('According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806'). Per 4.3.7, this hänvisning satisfies the requirement for koppling vara-ursprungsland. The invoice itself specifies origin per article. MATCH on this sub-requirement.

Certificate issue date: 2025-10-14. UK left the EU on 2020-01-31. The certificate explicitly lists UK as a SEPARATE origin alongside EU. The invoice lists 'United Kingdom' as origin for two items. UK is explicitly in the certificate → verified. UK is NOT an EU member at the certificate's date, so UK items are correctly listed separately from EU. No issue here.

comparison_steps.step: CRITICAL REASSESSMENT – Italy and Denmark in invoice but NOT explicitly in certificate
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains origins: Italy (for TO3068, TX4455, FR1625) and Denmark (for TX4499). Certificate lists: EU, China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan. Italy and Denmark are EU member states. Per 4.5.4.1, since certificate says 'EU', EU member states in the invoice are covered by 'EU' samlingsbegrepp. Italy and Denmark are both EU-27 members → covered. BUT: certificate also lists Bulgaria separately even though Bulgaria is an EU member. This is not a problem — listing Bulgaria separately alongside EU is redundant but not contradictory.

comparison_steps.step: CRITICAL CHECK – The Netherlands in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice lists 'The Netherlands' as origin for AT47108R01 SERVICE KIT. Certificate lists 'EU'. The Netherlands is an EU member state → covered by EU. ✓

comparison_steps.step: FINAL CRITICAL CHECK – Laminated Shims (TT47129, TT47182) have NO Country of Origin in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Reviewing invoice carefully: TT47129 LAMINATED SHIMS and TT47182 LAMINATED SHIMS do NOT have a 'Country of origin' line. These items have no CN code or origin listed. This is noted but per the ensidig verifiering principle, we verify certificate origins against invoice — we don't require every invoice item to have an origin. The certificate's generell varubeskrivning covers all items via fakturareferens.

comparison_steps.step: CRITICAL RE-CHECK – Certificate lists 'UK' as separate origin. UK is NOT an EU member post-Brexit. Invoice has UK origin items. UK is in certificate → verified.
comparison_steps.result: UK items verified. No issue.
All 5 certificate origins (EU, China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan) can be identified in the invoice. All invoice origins are covered by certificate origins. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: EU-normalisering – 'EU' in certificate covers EU member states Germany, Sweden, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands in invoice
Normalisering – China = People's Republic of China; UK = United Kingdom
Positiv verifiering – all certificate origins identifiable in invoice
Koppling vara-ursprungsland – certificate references invoice for per-article origin assignment

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origins: EU, China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan. Invoice per-article origins: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, People's Republic of China, United Kingdom, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands, Taiwan. Verification: (1) EU → Germany, Sweden, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands are all EU-27 members, verified per 4.5.4.1. (2) China → People's Republic of China in invoice, verified per 4.5.4 normalization. (3) Bulgaria → explicitly in invoice, verified. (4) UK → United Kingdom in invoice, verified per 4.5.4. (5) Taiwan → explicitly in invoice, verified. All certificate origins identified in invoice. Reverse check: all invoice non-EU origins (China, UK, Taiwan) are explicitly listed in certificate. All invoice EU origins are covered by 'EU' in certificate. No contradictions. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'EU, China, Bulgaria, UK, Taiwan'. Invoice origins per article: Germany (EU✓), Sweden (EU✓), Bulgaria (cert✓/EU✓), PRC (China in cert✓), UK (cert✓), Italy (EU✓), Denmark (EU✓), Netherlands (EU✓), Taiwan (cert✓). All 5 cert origins verifiable. No invoice origin uncovered. UK is post-Brexit non-EU but explicitly listed in cert. Laminated shims have no origin in invoice but this is 'additional information' absence, not a contradiction. MATCH.

evidence.description: Consignee country in invoice delivery address
Certificate goods description with invoice reference
evidence.raw_text: According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806
Country of origin: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands
Country of origin: People's Republic of China

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate.
Certificate from Document A page 1. Invoice from Document B pages 1-6. Document A pages 2-8 contain embedded invoice copy and T&C — not used for verification.
All three criteria met: order number match, consignor identifiable, consignee identifiable.
Certificate consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' not found verbatim in invoice, but 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' found. Proceeded to sequential check.
'Berg Prop Prod. AB' vs 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' — abbreviated words differ. Proceeded to 4.1.3.2.
Not a prefix truncation — individual words are abbreviated within the name. Proceeded to 4.1.3.3.
'Prop' = vedertagen abbreviation of 'Propulsion'; 'Prod.' = vedertagen abbreviation of 'Production'. Full name in invoice. Same address. Same country. No contradicting info.
No explicit Bill-To field in invoice. Delivery address used as fallback per 4.2.1.1.
Certificate: 'According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25'. Invoice: order S7081TR806, date 2025-07-04. Reference and date match.
Box 7: '1 pcs' = 1 shipment/package. Verified via matching fakturareferens.
EU in cert covers Germany, Sweden, Italy, Denmark, Netherlands in invoice. All EU-27 members.
Certificate has multiple origins and references invoice for per-article origin assignment.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is a different legal entity from 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The names share identical core ('Berg') and the differing words are vedertagna abbreviations: 'Prop' = 'Propulsion', 'Prod.' = 'Production'. Same address (Tärnvägen 15, HÖNÖ). Same country (Sweden). Rule 4.1.3.3 explicitly allows this. No other entity with similar name exists in the invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The 194 kg TW in certificate box 6 should be verified against invoice and might cause MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.4.2.1, box 7 ('1 pcs') is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet. The 194 kg TW is in box 6 as supplementary packaging information. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verified — the försändelsekvantitet '1 pcs' is verified. The invoice does not contain a total weight that contradicts 194 kg. No MISMATCH triggered.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Italy and Denmark in invoice but not explicitly listed in certificate should cause MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate lists 'EU' as origin. Italy and Denmark are EU-27 member states. Per 4.5.4.1, EU as samlingsbegrepp covers all EU member states. Per 4.5.4.1.1, additional EU member states in invoice that are not explicitly named in certificate do not cause MISMATCH when certificate says 'EU'. All conditions of 4.5.4.1.1 met.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: UK (United Kingdom) listed separately in certificate alongside EU could indicate confusion since UK was formerly an EU member
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate issue date is 2025-10-14. UK left the EU on 2020-01-31. UK is correctly listed as a separate non-EU origin. Invoice confirms 'United Kingdom' as origin for specific items. No inconsistency.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter har verifierats framgångsrikt. Avsändaren Berg Prop Prod. AB kunde identifieras som Berg Propulsion Production AB i fakturan (vedertagen förkortning). Mottagaren BERG Propulsion Shanghai finns i fakturans leveransadress. Varubeskrivningen verifierades genom hänvisning till fakturan med ordernummer S7081TR806. Kvantiteten 1 styck (försändelse) verifierades. Samtliga ursprungsländer (EU, Kina, Bulgarien, UK, Taiwan) kunde identifieras i fakturans per-artikel-ursprungsuppgifter.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair: Certifikat SEG-25D-374351 mot Commercial invoice order S7081TR806

sections.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Kommersiell förkortning – 'Prop' = 'Propulsion', 'Prod.' = 'Production'. Fullständigt juridiskt namn framgår i fakturan. Adress och land överensstämmer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' är en vedertagen kommersiell förkortning av 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' som uttryckligen framgår i fakturans sidfot. Adressen Tärnvägen 15, HÖNÖ och landet Sverige matchar exakt.

sections.certificate_value: BERG Propulsion Shanghai, Room1704, Xu Hui Wan Ke Centre, Lee Kun Kee Plaza, No 970, Nanning Road, Shanghai P.R.C 200235, China
sections.invoice_value: BERG Propulsion Shanghai, Rm. 1704, Xu Hui Wan Ke Center Lee Kun Kee Plaza, No.970, Nanning Road, Shanghai, 200235, PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn identifierat i fakturans leveransadress. Landkontroll: China = People's Republic of China.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'BERG Propulsion Shanghai' finns exakt i fakturans leveransadress. Landet China = People's Republic of China efter normalisering. Fakturan saknar explicit faktureringsfält, varför leveransadressen används som fallback.

sections.certificate_value: Order:S7081TR806, SHIP SPARES 1x 80*60*78cm TW: 194 kg, According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25
sections.invoice_value: Commercial invoice order S7081TR806, date 2025-07-04, containing bearings, seals, o-rings, washers, springs, service kits etc.
sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certifikatet hänvisar uttryckligen till bifogad faktura med ordernummer och datum som matchar.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'SHIP SPARES' med hänvisning 'According to attached invoice with order number S7081TR806 dated 04/07/25'. Fakturan har ordernummer S7081TR806 och datum 2025-07-04 (= 04/07/25 i DD/MM/YY-format). Fakturan innehåller reservdelar till fartyg vilket är förenligt med 'SHIP SPARES'.

sections.invoice_value: Flera artikelrader totalt, ingen explicit totalkvantitet
sections.rule_applied: Försändelsekvantitet – '1 pcs' tolkas som 1 försändelsepaket, verifierat via matchande fakturareferens.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger '1 pcs' vilket utgör en försändelsekvantitet (1 kolli/paket, beskrivet som '1x 80*60*78cm' i box 6). Certifikatet innehåller verifierad fakturareferens (order S7081TR806). Fakturan innehåller varuspecifikation för samma order. Ingen motsägande kvantitetsuppgift i fakturan.

sections.invoice_value: Germany, Sweden, Bulgaria, People's Republic of China, United Kingdom, Italy, Denmark, The Netherlands, Taiwan
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (EU täcker Tyskland, Sverige, Italien, Danmark, Nederländerna som alla är EU-27-medlemmar). Landnormalisering: China = PRC, UK = United Kingdom.
sections.motivation: Samtliga fem certifikatursprung verifierade: EU → fakturan har Germany, Sweden, Italy, Denmark, Netherlands (alla EU-27). China → People's Republic of China i fakturan. Bulgaria → explicit i fakturan. UK → United Kingdom i fakturan. Taiwan → explicit i fakturan. Inga icke-EU-ursprung i fakturan som saknas i certifikatet. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All confidence values ≥ 0.85. No contradictions between motivation and status in any checkpoint.
